name: exif_core_parameter_second_stage_audit

all_exif_522.definition: All IDs in Image_Metadata_All.xlsx aligned one-to-one to the fixed 522 master split

cohorts.excluded_interpretation: S2_425 is post-hoc and was not used as the current formal cohort

patient_group_source: split patient_group_id; image suffix -digits removed by authoritative split builder

statistical_methods.descriptive: image-level and patient_group median; quantiles, IQR, raw MAD
statistical_methods.outliers: within-camera IQR 1.5 rule and robust z=0.67448975*(x-median)/MAD, abs(z)>3.5; known high ISO abs(z)>5
statistical_methods.APEX: Pearson, Spearman, OLS slope/intercept/R2 and camera interaction
statistical_methods.NYHA: Kruskal-Wallis, epsilon squared, empirical histogram overlap, BH-FDR
statistical_methods.SEX: Mann-Whitney U, rank-biserial effect, empirical histogram overlap, BH-FDR
statistical_methods.correlation: Pearson and Spearman overall and within camera
statistical_methods.VIF: 1/(1-R2), exact deterministic dependencies reported as infinity

image_quality.source: existing color-preserving aligned_rgb with existing parsing_label class 1 skin mask

software.python: 3.13.9 | packaged by Anaconda, Inc. | (main, Oct 21 2025, 19:09:58) [MSC v.1929 64 bit (AMD64)]

alignment_checks.detail: patient_group_id, NYHA, SEX and label_3class compared for all formal IDs

report_summary.shortcut_answer: 存在需要严肃控制的设备/采集捷径，但尚不足以否定受约束的物理校正路线。
report_summary.optical_support: 支持继续条件光学反演，但必须禁止camera_id/raw EXIF进入NYHA分类分支并做设备敏感性分析。
